title: 秋華賞の後に・疼く両脚

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What does that matter? I lost!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The last thing I wanted was to see her ahead of
me... Ugh, there's so much I need to work on...
choice_data_list: You can apply it in the next race.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I will. This isn't over. Not while I have anything to
say about it.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I won't let Vodka steal the number one spot from
me!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Trainer, let's pick out our next race! I
won't be satisfied until I beat her!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Right now, please! I want to keep this momentum
going!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: How about the Queen Elizabeth II Cup?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Today, I wanted to beat you more than I wanted
to get first place.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The race might be finished, but my heart's still
poundin'. I wanna go again!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The Queen Elizabeth II Cup is just around the
corner, so I'll be waitin' for ya there.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The next time we meet, I'm going to beat her for
sure!
